title: AI YouTube Automation: How to Start a YouTube Channel With AI
summary: Arthur Winer demonstrates a full AI-powered YouTube production workflow covering idea research, scripting, avatar generation, editing, and upload. The tutorial walks through 11 production stages using multiple AI tools and services, from trending topic discovery via ChatGPT to final repurposing via Opus Clip, completing a video from blank screen to published in 20 minutes.
writeup: Arthur demonstrates a full AI-driven YouTube production workflow, moving from idea research through scripting, voice cloning, AI avatar generation, video editing, and upload. The pipeline chains multiple tools: ChatGPT and Claude for writing, ElevenLabs for voice, HeyGen for avatars, Descript and Opus Clip for editing and repurposing, and VidIQ for research. The throughline is automating the steps of channel production to scale output.
